Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-27 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an exceptional outlier in LINC, which ranks #1 with a score of 95.5 and displays extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—returning 1,427.61% over 10 years, 489.91% over 5 years, and 162.27% over 1 year. LINC passes all technical criteria (all four moving averages above price, 4 of 4 ratio thresholds met) with a "strong_buy" signal and "clean" momentum flag, while also dramatically outpacing SPY and QQQ by 1,217.22% and 1,003.54% respectively over the 10-year period. In contrast, MPC (ranked second) shows more modest returns of 558.72% over 10 years and only 68.1% over 1 year, with a notably weaker 1-year relative performance versus SPY at 56.53%, suggesting LINC represents an unusually strong secular trend story compared to typical portfolio holdings. LINC's correlation structure shows balanced exposure across industrial and financial sectors (XLB at 0.366, XLI at 0.315) with minimal commodity exposure (DBA at 0.031), indicating this momentum stems from operational outperform
